config.scxml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<scxml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/07/scxml" xmlns:editor="http://vscxml.com/editor" version="1.0" datamodel="ecmascript" initial="operational" name="HamiltonSTAR_PipChannel">
  <datamodel>
    <data id="channel_count" expr="16"/>
    <data id="tip_pattern" expr="0"/>
    <data id="tip_type" expr="-1"/>
    <data id="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
    <data id="position_x_01mm" expr="0"/>
    <data id="position_y_01mm" expr="0"/>
    <data id="position_z_01mm" expr="0"/>
    <data id="last_lld_height_01mm" expr="0"/>
    <data id="last_error" expr="0"/>
    <data id="tadm_status" expr="'ok'"/>
    <data id="liquid_class" expr="'default'"/>
  </datamodel>
  <state id="operational" initial="not_initialized" editor:x="12" editor:y="12" editor:width="2007" editor:height="674" editor:label="operational" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="37">
    <state id="not_initialized" editor:x="1752" editor:y="569" editor:width="225" editor:height="75" editor:label="not_initialized" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="38">
      <onentry>
        <assign expr="0" location="tip_pattern"/>
        <assign expr="-1" location="tip_type"/>
        <assign expr="0" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
      </onentry>
      <transition target="no_tip" event="C0DI" editor:waypoints="42,631;42,519;1138,519;1138,412" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N675RK2E15J03KCYMS">
        <log expr="'Initialize PIP channels'" label="FW"/>
        <assign expr="0" location="tip_pattern"/>
        <assign expr="-1" location="tip_type"/>
        <assign expr="0" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
        <raise event="DI.complete"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="idle" initial="no_tip" editor:x="80" editor:y="122" editor:width="1241" editor:height="435" editor:label="idle" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="39">
      <transition target="moving" event="C0JM" editor:waypoints="1383,412;1383,477" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6D5AGC55NDEFTA9DS">
        <log expr="'Move to position'" label="FW"/>
        <assign expr="_event.data.xp" location="position_x_01mm"/>
        <assign expr="_event.data.yp" location="position_y_01mm"/>
        <assign expr="_event.data.zp" location="position_z_01mm"/>
        <raise event="JM.complete"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="idle" event="C0ZA" editor:waypoints="1351,266;1351,112;50,112;50,527" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6Z4H5BRB2Z6ZPWXK9">
        <log expr="'Move all PIP to Z-safety'" label="FW"/>
        <assign expr="0" location="position_z_01mm"/>
      </transition>
      <state id="no_tip" editor:x="1061" editor:y="218" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="no_tip" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="40">
        <transition target="tip_empty" event="C0TP" editor:waypoints="1118,397;1118,503;122,503;122,426;137,426.02;785,426.02;785,403.02" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N62EKGGW0T95R66FHP">
          <log expr="'Tip pick-up'" label="FW"/>
          <assign expr="_event.data.tm" location="tip_pattern"/>
          <assign expr="_event.data.tt" location="tip_type"/>
          <raise event="TP.complete"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="error" event="C0AS" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N678HE1RAWV60GDRRB">
          <assign expr="8" location="last_error"/>
          <log expr="'Cannot aspirate: no tip (error 08)'" label="FW_ERROR"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="error" event="C0DS" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6Q7560HA4D4WQ9ZKQ">
          <assign expr="8" location="last_error"/>
          <log expr="'Cannot dispense: no tip (error 08)'" label="FW_ERROR"/>
        </transition>
      </state>
      <state id="tip_fitted" initial="tip_empty" editor:x="45" editor:y="49.00999999999999" editor:width="863" editor:height="277.02" editor:label="tip_fitted" editor:color="theme:fill:2" editor:zIndex="41">
        <transition target="washing" event="C0LW" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N62BQYBPW0M1FATNXR">
          <log expr="'DC Wash'" label="FW"/>
          <assign expr="0" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
          <raise event="LW.complete"/>
        </transition>
        <state id="tip_empty" editor:x="658" editor:y="161.01999999999998" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="tip_empty" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="42">
          <onentry>
            <assign expr="0" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
          </onentry>
          <transition target="tip_loaded" event="C0AS" editor:waypoints="615,369.03;615,350.03;542,350.03;542,333.03" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6V410S9QY3TVDK3KN">
            <log expr="'Aspirate: vol=' + _event.data.av" label="FW"/>
            <assign expr="_event.data.av" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
            <raise event="AS.complete"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="no_tip" event="C0TR" editor:waypoints="1010,378;1025,378;1025,382" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6EHTC1DNYC125DXH4">
            <log expr="'Tip eject'" label="FW"/>
            <assign expr="0" location="tip_pattern"/>
            <assign expr="-1" location="tip_type"/>
            <raise event="TR.complete"/>
          </transition>
        </state>
        <state id="tip_loaded" editor:x="112.5" editor:y="105.02" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="tip_loaded" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="43">
          <transition target="tip_empty" event="C0DS" cond="_event.data.dm <= 1" editor:waypoints="532,348.03;532,382.03" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6110XSSNEPT2ARXP9">
            <log expr="'Dispense (jet): vol=' + _event.data.dv" label="FW"/>
            <assign expr="Math.max(0, volume_held_01ul - _event.data.dv)" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
            <raise event="DS.complete"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="tip_loaded" event="C0DS" cond="_event.data.dm == 2 || _event.data.dm == 3" editor:waypoints="177.5,99.02999999999999;212.5,99.02999999999999" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N607BM233N94C2MRSG">
            <log expr="'Dispense (partial): vol=' + _event.data.dv" label="FW"/>
            <assign expr="Math.max(0, volume_held_01ul - _event.data.dv)" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="tip_empty" event="C0DS" cond="_event.data.dm == 4" editor:waypoints="760,318.03;760,357.03" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6QG9BBAN4ENN8Y64S">
            <log expr="'Dispense (empty tip)'" label="FW"/>
            <assign expr="0" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="no_tip" event="C0TR" editor:waypoints="527,299.02;527,298.02;1010,298;1025,298;1025,367" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N606T2E6BR1EZSAAB7">
            <log expr="'Tip eject with liquid'" label="FW_WARN"/>
            <assign expr="0" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
            <assign expr="0" location="tip_pattern"/>
            <assign expr="-1" location="tip_type"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="tip_loaded" event="C0DF" editor:waypoints="142.5,69.02999999999999;247.5,69.02999999999999" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6B6HGZ55F3CRGJFZA">
            <log expr="'Dispense on fly'" label="FW"/>
            <assign expr="Math.max(0, volume_held_01ul - (_event.data.dv * _event.data.xi))" location="volume_held_01ul"/>
          </transition>
        </state>
      </state>
    </state>
    <state id="moving" editor:x="1479" editor:y="440" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="moving" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="44">
      <transition target="idle" event="JM.complete" editor:waypoints="1456,502;1456,615;52,615;52,529" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6999B2BGJXQ38K1EM"/>
    </state>
    <state id="washing" editor:x="1479" editor:y="226" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="washing" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="45">
      <transition target="tip_empty" event="LW.complete" editor:waypoints="1373,263;1373,78;52,78;52,415;137,415.02;775,415.02;775,390.02" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6B4B17RVZMVTPJM1E"/>
    </state>
    <state id="error" editor:x="1479" editor:y="340" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="error" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="46">
      <onentry>
        <log expr="'Error code: ' + last_error" label="PIP_ERROR"/>
      </onentry>
      <transition target="not_initialized" event="C0DI" editor:waypoints="1749,390;1749,606" editor:id="t_01KP3P37N6481NTY0TTNCC5W6K">
        <assign expr="0" location="last_error"/>
        <log expr="'Re-init after error'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
  </state>

  <ext:traces xmlns:ext="http://vscxml.com/extensions"><ext:trace description="Init -> TipPickUp -> Aspirate 100ul -> Dispense jet -> TipEject -> Aspirate without tip (error 08)" name="happy_path_then_error" recorded="2026-04-13T15:07:33.171108600Z">{"timestamp":369646618730,"type":"session_start","scxml_name":"HamiltonSTAR_PipChannel","datamodel":"ecmascript"}
{"timestamp":369646642386,"type":"state_enter","state_id":"operational"}
{"timestamp":369646660494,"type":"state_enter","state_id":"not_initialized"}
{"timestamp":369646720504,"type":"event_received","event_name":"C0DI","event_type":"external","event_data":{"tt":4,"yp":1460,"tm":1,"xp":2980}}
{"timestamp":369646723406,"type":"transition","from":"not_initialized","to":"no_tip","event":"C0DI"}
{"timestamp":369646724135,"type":"state_exit","state_id":"not_initialized"}
{"timestamp":369646725453,"type":"log","label":"FW","message":"Initialize PIP channels"}
{"timestamp":369646726232,"type":"state_enter","state_id":"idle"}
{"timestamp":369646726681,"type":"state_enter","state_id":"no_tip"}
{"timestamp":369646780416,"type":"event_received","event_name":"C0TP","event_type":"external","event_data":{"td":0,"tm":1,"yp":1460,"xp":2980,"tt":4}}
{"timestamp":369646780607,"type":"transition","from":"no_tip","to":"tip_empty","event":"C0TP"}
{"timestamp":369646780825,"type":"state_exit","state_id":"no_tip"}
{"timestamp":369646781733,"type":"log","label":"FW","message":"Tip pick-up"}
{"timestamp":369646783129,"type":"state_enter","state_id":"tip_fitted"}
{"timestamp":369646783879,"type":"state_enter","state_id":"tip_empty"}
{"timestamp":369646836459,"type":"event_received","event_name":"C0AS","event_type":"external","event_data":{"at":0,"as":500,"lm":1,"ba":30,"ta":50,"xp":5000,"zl":1200,"tm":1,"av":1000,"yp":2500}}
{"timestamp":369646836698,"type":"transition","from":"tip_empty","to":"tip_loaded","event":"C0AS"}
{"timestamp":369646836942,"type":"state_exit","state_id":"tip_empty"}
{"timestamp":369646839308,"type":"log","label":"FW","message":"Aspirate: vol=1000"}
{"timestamp":369646840349,"type":"state_enter","state_id":"tip_loaded"}
{"timestamp":369646898707,"type":"event_received","event_name":"C0DS","event_type":"external","event_data":{"dv":1000,"ss":100,"ds":500,"tm":1,"dm":0,"xp":7000,"yp":3200,"rv":10}}
{"timestamp":369646953746,"type":"event_received","event_name":"C0TR","event_type":"external","event_data":{"yp":1000,"xp":1000,"tm":1}}
{"timestamp":369647007259,"type":"event_received","event_name":"C0AS","event_type":"external","event_data":{"av":500,"at":0,"lm":0}}</ext:trace></ext:traces>
</scxml>
